title: Entity Follow Owner Behavior
description: Allows a mob to follow the player that owns it.

can_teleport.title: Can Teleport
can_teleport.description: Defines if the mob will teleport to its owner when too far away.

ignore_vibration.title: Ignore Vibration
ignore_vibration.description: Defines if the mob should disregard following its owner after detecting a recent vibration.

max_distance.title: Max Distance
max_distance.description: The maximum distance the mob can be from its owner to start following it. Applicable only when "can_teleport" is set to false.

post_teleport_distance.title: Post Teleport Distance
post_teleport_distance.description: Defines how far (in blocks) the entity will be from its owner after teleporting. If not specified, it defaults to "stop_distance" + 1, allowing the entity to seamlessly resume navigation.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• allay: 6
• parrot: 3

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description:
Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this AI Goal

Sample values:
• allay: 8
• parrot: 1

start_distance.title: Start Distance
start_distance.description:
The minimum distance the mob must be from its owner to start following it.

Sample values:
• allay: 16
• parrot: 5

stop_distance.title: Stop Distance
stop_distance.description:
The distance at which the mob will stop following its owner.

Sample values:
• allay: 4
• parrot: 1
